design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate post-apocalyptic levels as special forces soldier, acquire color-coded weapon orbs, defeat alien invasion through run-and-gun and shoot-em-up combat sequences
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource scarcity (limited lives, no continues) combined with weapon switching strategy and pattern execution against diverse enemy types
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Elite soldier defending Earth against alien invasion using an arsenal of experimental laser weapons
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Hybrid action design merging Contra-style run-and-gun with full shoot-em-up boss encounters; unforgiving arcade philosophy (no continues, 5-hit permadeath per life) combined with pre-rendered graphics aesthetic influenced by Donkey Kong Country's technical approach

difficulty.lives_system: Player selectable 3 to 7 lives; can absorb 5 hits per life before losing it; pits cause instant death regardless of health
difficulty.continues_system: No continues available; practice essential to completion
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player can adjust starting lives (3-7 range) but cannot unlock easier modes; weapon choice provides tactical flexibility but core challenge remains constant

progression.upgrade_system: Color-coded floating orb weapon drops provide laser gun variety; weapon switching required for optimal play rather than traditional RPG upgrades
progression.unlock_mechanism: Weapons discovered through progression; high score screen tracking suggests implicit replayability hook
replayability_hooks: High score tracking encourages score optimization
Multiple weapon types to master and experiment with
Selectable life counts create variable difficulty playthroughs

world_building_techniques: Post-apocalyptic setting establishing alien invasion stakes
Visual aesthetic of environmental destruction and alien presence
Soldier protagonist framing through game title and objective

boss_design.philosophy: Dual-mode boss encounters: traditional run-and-gun melee confrontations alternate with full shoot-em-up vertical/horizontal scrolling sequences, requiring distinct tactical approaches

faction_indicators: Rendering Ranger as elite special forces soldier
Earth defenders vs. alien invaders binary
Military hierarchy implicit in soldier protagonist
environmental_storytelling: Post-apocalyptic landscape indicating prior civilization destruction
Alien presence communicated through enemy design and setting
Weapon orbs suggest military infrastructure and technological advancement
